rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §28.005 governs language of instruction in public schools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not intersect.
quote: English shall be the basic language of instruction in public schools.
_note: No relationship between the proposed Tax Code homestead exemption change and the Education Code language-of-instruction rule.
